features: Goes on clear & stays on clear, providing invisible sweat protection
Gel formula for easy application on skin
Official Antiperspirant of the Olympic and Paralympic Games Paris 2024
description: Product Description Gillette Clear Gel Champion Gold Antiperspirant & Deodorant For Men - Don't mask odour, neutralise it. Gillette men's antiperspirant clear gel gives you high performance sweat and odour protection for 72 hours. Its precision engineered formula will keep you fresh all day. Gillette Clear Gel goes on clear and stays on clear, giving you invisible sweat protection that lasts. Ingredients Aqua, Aluminum Zirconium Octachlorohydrex Gly, Alcohol Denat., Cyclopentasiloxane, Propylene Glycol, Dimethicone, Calcium Chloride, PEG/PPG-18/18 Dimethicone, Parfum, Coumarin, Geraniol, Citronellol Directions Apply to underarm area Safety Warning KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. If rash develops discontinue use. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble Service Gmbh, 65823 Schwalbach am Taunus See more
